title: Amazon CloudWatch Alarm
description: Represents an Amazon CloudWatch metric alarm with its associated configuration, state, and notification actions.

alarmArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the alarm

alarmConfigurationUpdatedTimestamp.description: The time stamp of the last update to the alarm configuration

actionsEnabled.description: Indicates whether actions should be executed during any changes to the alarm state

alarmActions.description: The actions to execute when this alarm transitions to the ALARM state

items.description: The ARN of an action (SNS topic, Auto Scaling policy, etc.)

okActions.description: The actions to execute when this alarm transitions to the OK state

insufficientDataActions.description: The actions to execute when this alarm transitions to the INSUFFICIENT_DATA state

stateValue.description: The state value for the alarm

stateReason.description: An explanation for the alarm state in human-readable text format

stateReasonData.description: An explanation for the alarm state in JSON format

stateUpdatedTimestamp.description: The time stamp of the last update to the alarm state

metricName.description: The name of the metric associated with the alarm

namespace.description: The namespace of the metric associated with the alarm

statistic.description: The statistic for the metric specified in MetricName

extendedStatistic.description: The percentile statistic for the metric specified in MetricName

dimensions.description: The dimensions for the metric specified in MetricName

period.description: The length in seconds of the evaluation period for the alarm

evaluationPeriods.description: The number of periods over which data is compared to the specified threshold

datapointsToAlarm.description: The number of data points that must be breaching to trigger the alarm

threshold.description: The value against which the specified statistic is compared

comparisonOperator.description: The arithmetic operation to use when comparing the specified statistic and threshold

treatMissingData.description: Sets how this alarm is to handle missing data points

unit.description: The unit of measure for the statistic

Dimension.description: A dimension is a name/value pair that is part of the identity of a metric

Tag.description: A key-value pair associated with the alarm
